author: DominicVainMod
content:
@All Pings @Game Pings
Information & Timing - Tomorrow's SAGE Update

Hey everyone, the Crew utility update in Star Atlas: Golden Era is happening  ()! During this time, SAGE will have a window of downtime that will last approximately 4 hours while we update the game. 

This Update Includes:
All Crew members will become individual and unique cNFTs, functioning as autonomous units, no longer tied to specific ships.,All fleets will be disbanded and returned to your faction's Central Space Station, burning any cargo in your ships.,All open crafting processes will be cancelled.,All resource inventory at Starbases will remain at that Starbase.,
Important Information on the Next Epoch:
Since the update goes live during the  -  epoch, there will be no ATLAS earnings for it. The missed earnings will be evenly distributed across the 7 epochs following the update instead.

 | https://based.staratlas.com/
